name: Chitin Armor
description: Medium armor formed from layered chitin, balancing mobility and guard.

name: Chain Mail
description: Medium armor made of interlinked metal rings.

name: Scale Armor
description: Medium armor of overlapping metal scales that shifts with your movement.

name: Wyrmhide Jerkin
description: Medium jerkin of enchanted wyrmhide — no metal, yet as tough as the best plate studded mail.
